name: TierContentSelector

neutralConcepts: content_access_level IN accessLevels[] at query layer (BuildSearchFilter)
accessLevels[] from MembershipActivated payload — not re-computed

ironRules.rule: content_access_level IN accessLevels[] must be passed to BuildSearchFilter — not post-filtered in application code.
Cursor ceiling = 50 — never retrieve more than 50 documents per feed seed operation.
accessLevels[] sourced from T100 MembershipActivated payload — T105 must not re-query subscriptions.
Feed records stored with knowledgeScope=PRIVATE — per-user feed, not shared.

keywords: tier content selector query layer filter content access level BuildSearchFilter cursor ceiling 50
